dict.string: Beaconator needs access to Bluetooth to broadcast and detect beacons.
Beaconator needs to act as a Bluetooth peripheral to broadcast beacon signals.
Beaconator uses location permissions to detect nearby iBeacons while the app is open.
Beaconator uses the camera to scan a QR code containing a beacon UUID from another device.
Beaconator needs access to your location to broadcast beacons and detect nearby devices even in the background.
